overview: SearchLift Technologies is a premium, fully responsive multi-page website for a digital marketing agency. It features a modern glassmorphism design with blue gradients, animated hero sections, and conversion-focused pages covering SEO, digital marketing, website development, blog content, and a lead-capturing contact form.
features: 5-page website with React Router navigation (Home, About, Services, Blog, Contact)
Animated hero with floating geometric shapes and gradient background
Glassmorphism card design with backdrop blur and soft shadows
Blog listing with single post view, skeleton loading states, and sample SEO content
Contact form with full validation, success state, and Google Maps embed
Sticky navbar with mobile hamburger menu and active route highlighting
Scroll-triggered fade-in animations using Intersection Observer
Statistics counter section, process steps, and industry sections
Fully responsive layout for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Inter font, Lucide icons, and consistent blue gradient (#20417B to #1E90FF) design system
